headline: Apple Ends 'Net-Cash Neutral' Policy
summary: Back in the 2010s, Apple had a problem: it had too much cash, and more kept coming in. It announced a plan to get to bring those in line, and get net cash close to zero through an aggressive return of cash through share buybacks and dividends.

headline: Apple says India antitrust body overstepping judicial authority as spat intensifies

The Commission said the DMA, which became applicable in May 2023, has improved conditions for businesses and users.

Slower replacement cycles for electronics and cautious consumer spending amid persistent economic uncertainty have pressured Corning's business, offsetting gains in its optical communications segment.
